choices.text: Sky Crane: heat shield + supersonic chute + backshell eject + powered descent stage hovers + lowers rover 7m on cables + cuts cables flies away. Too heavy for direct rocket landing (engines dig surface). 7 minutes of terror multi-stage.

questions.explanation: Sky Crane for heavy Mars rovers.

choices.text: Curiosity (2012): 20 km × 6 km ellipse. Perseverance (2021): 7 × 6 km. Starship goal: <100m. Falcon 9 booster: <10m on drone ship. Improvement from terrain-relative navigation + propulsive landing + precision sensors.
